channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Mining companies move deeper into AI, HPC as MARA may sell Bitcoin
item.description: In a Monday SEC filing, the US Bitcoin miner said it would consider selling some of the coins on its balance sheet, depending on market conditions.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Says It May Sell BTC Holdings in Strategy Shift
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner MARA Holdings may sell more of its BTC as part of a strategy shift, the firm said in a new SEC filing.

item.title: American Bitcoin boosts hashrate with 11,298 new mining machines
item.description: The Eric Trump-led company adds 3 EH/s in new capacity, expanding its Alberta mining fleet as it deepens exposure to BTC amid volatile market conditions.

item.title: Bitcoin attempting to make a stand as global stock markets melt down on Iran war
item.description: Having already plunged in the months leading up to the Middle East conflict, crypto markets so far aren't making new lows this week.

item.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Slams Stablecoin Yield Demands: 'The Public Will Pay'
item.description: Jamie Dimon said if crypto companies like Coinbase want to offer stablecoin rewards, then they should become banks. “Then you can do whatever you want,” he said.

item.title: Bitcoin dives 3% on global asset rout as $5K gold 'smashed' on oil fears
item.description: Bitcoin bulls gave up their latest mission to reclaim $70,000 as Iran escalation sparked oil supply fears that gripped stocks and gold.

item.title: End of bitcoin 'HODL': public miners going all-in on AI, signaling more BTC selling
item.description: Public bitcoin miner balance sheets are shifting as capital rotates from bitcoin treasuries to AI infrastructure.

item.title: CFTC chief Selig to clear path for U.S. perpetual futures in coming weeks
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission chairman, appearing beside his Securities and Exchange Commission counterpart, said several crypto policies are coming.

item.title: Here is why Harvard trimmed bitcoin and bought ether and why the move is bullish for crypto
item.description: Volatility and private equity cash needs, not a market bet, may explain the endowment’s crypto shift, experts say.

item.title: Trump Brothers' American Bitcoin Boosts Mining Capacity Following Q4 Loss
item.description: American Bitcoin stock is down Tuesday after the firm said it purchased 11,298 new BTC miners to expand its fleet.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Google Nano Banana 2 vs ByteDance Seedream 5.0 Lite: Which AI Image Generator Is Best?
item.description: A hands-on comparison between Google's Nano Banana 2 and ByteDance's Seedream 5.0 shows how the latest image models differ on price, speed, and creative control.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE plunges 10%, leading index lower
item.description: Cardano (ADA), down 5.9% from Monday, joined Aave (AAVE) as an underperformer.

item.title: Visa and Stripe’s Bridge plan stablecoin card expansion to over 100 countries
item.description: Visa and Stripe-owned Bridge aim to expand stablecoin-linked Visa cards to 18 countries, and plan 100-plus by the end of the year, while testing stablecoin settlement with Lead Bank.

item.title: Ondo Finance tokenized stocks platform on Binance wins regulatory approval in Abu Dhabi
item.description: The regulatory nod will let UAE-based financial institutions deal in tokenized equities on Binance's regulated trading venue.

item.title: Strive strategist says AI deflation could push Bitcoin to $11M by 2036
item.description: Strive’s Joe Burnett argues AI-driven deflation may force looser policy, pushing Bitcoin toward $11 million a coin by 2036 and a $230 trillion market cap.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: SWIFT partners with BNY Mellon to design a blockchain-based ledger for cross-border payments and tokenized assets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBGMGl6TmRjR2VZTk05TktRbThHZlFlTUVZT0JDNXFGaGpndzNjRFlTdjZiMzllb0c1ci1pcllua2dqcVVGSVZWYUpxeUltOVRqaUF2SmQ0YWFqRkNRTFd1R2pIS1k?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: SWIFT partners with BNY…

item.title: Ether price again rejected at $2K: How low can ETH go in March?
item.description: Ether needed to hold a key support recently established at $1,800, coinciding with the lower trend line of a classic chart pattern that warns of a drop below $1,500.

item.title: Visa and Bridge plan stablecoin-linked card expansion to over 100 countries
item.description: Bridge has partnered with Lead Bank, a participant in Visa’s stablecoin settlement pilot, to help businesses and fintechs offer stablecoin-backed Visa cards.

item.title: Iranian Exchange Outflows Spiked to $10.3M Amid Airstrikes: Chainalysis
item.description: Some $10.3 million left Iranian exchanges in the days after joint US-Israeli strikes, with hourly volumes approaching $2 million at the peak.

item.title: Aave Chan Initiative to exit Aave DAO after governance clash over funding
item.description: The move follows a 52.58% Snapshot vote on a $42.5 million funding package for Aave Labs, now headed to the ARFC stage before any binding onchain decision.

item.title: Morning Minute: The Banks Are Coming for Crypto Custody
item.description: It's no longer a matter of if major banks will custody crypto but a matter of when, with Morgan Stanley, Citigroup and Barclays all lining up.

item.title: Bitcoin could slide further on liquidity squeeze, but long-term bull case intact: Sygnum CIO
item.description: Fabian Dori says a short-term liquidity squeeze is driving crypto’s slump, with further downside possible, though improving macro data and fundamentals could speed a recovery.

item.title: Boomers to the rescue again as bitcoin ETFs record $1.5b of inflows in the past 5 days after another big day yesterday. Biggest haul in a while, just about all of the original ten spot ETFs seeing action too = breadth and depth. This after a 50%(!) drawdown and - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBZbnQ2azBZLTNvbzgweUVHUmZ1Y1JvZF9zX1R1OHo1R3k0TEZuQXR5ajJ5ZG1lUzdWZHF6TzJpdko5akNjQXV4WmZUd201QzRzbExIVHBOUnZfOGFoa18zSzE2UUk?oc=5" target="_blank">Boomers to the rescue again as …

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Iran's new Defence Minister assassinated. 24hours after taking over the role from his predecessor who was also assassinated. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5FZDVBdGstMjVFaUIwd3Y1WUJMbVVxZjZ6R0lFOVpjd1JneE02b2NPcFJ1bUpxbV9oNEt6YkU3TkZvZHZ3WU9iM01fa3ZMZWlCVFhRLUJnckE0RGJVZFBibXlR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Iran's new Defence Min…

item.title: Deloitte signs off on Anchorage reserve report for Tether’s USAT stablecoin
item.description: Big Four firm Deloitte attested to $17.6 million in reserves backing USAt, Tether’s new US-regulated stablecoin issued by Anchorage Digital Bank.

item.title: Bybit claims new fraud system stopped $300M of risky withdrawals in Q4 2025
item.description: Bybit says most of the $300 million “saved” came from users backing out after real-time warnings, highlighting how exchanges are shifting from recovery to preemptive fraud stops.

item.title: Oil shock and inflation fears drag down bitcoin
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 3, 2026

item.title: Japan PM Takaichi disavows ‘Sanae Token’ after memecoin hits $28M peak
item.description: Japanese PM Sanae Takaichi said she had no knowledge of the token, as Kyodo reported the FSA was considering whether unregistered operators were involved.

item.title: NEW: The Bank of Japan will experiment with blockchain to settle deposits held by financial institutions at the central bank, enabling 24/7 instant settlement and reducing gridlock risk in stress events. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9RaVh4eVEwejVKQ2ZXT3RpQXFkSC1FSkpsRmc4RmdjOVdaRDZhMjdlYy1kekYxSERXMVB3M1ppMS1lMk5kVzFib0plajF2ZXZUSXhESXRaQUVDSnVfOVE?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: The Bank of Japan will experiment …

item.title: Four Headwinds Stalling Bitcoin's $70K Breakout
item.description: Bitcoin pulled back from Monday’s peak near $70,000 as geopolitical and economic headwinds hold a recovery rally in check.

item.title: Stablecoins could weaken bank lending and monetary policy in Europe: ECB
item.description: The European Central Bank warns in a new working paper that as stablecoin adoption grows, deposits may leave banks, affecting lending and monetary policy transmission.

item.title: Dollar surge pressures crypto markets after escalation in Iran conflict
item.description: Risk assets fell across the board Tuesday as the U.S. dollar strengthened to a near two-month high following renewed military escalation in Iran, pressuring the crypto market.

item.title: ‘Scam token’ case against Uniswap dismissed by U.S. district judge in NYC
item.description: District Judge says that due to the protocol’s decentralized nature, the identities of the scam token issuers are basically unknown, leaving plaintiffs with no identifiable defendant.

item.title: Bitcoin price chart ‘death cross’ is back, reviving late-cycle fears
item.description: BTC price has slid about 35% on average over a month after similar trend line crossovers, keeping downside risk in focus for traders.

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket face trading halt in Nevada after court rulings
item.description: The two separate rulings add new regulatory pressure as prediction markets also face scrutiny over information advantages and suspected insider activity tied to event-driven contracts.

item.title: Japan prime minister Sanae Takaichi disavows Solana meme coin after it crashes by 75%
item.description: Japan’s prime minister says she has no knowledge of or involvement in a Solana-based meme token that briefly reached a $27.7 million market cap before tumbling.

item.title: Riot reports record $647M revenue in 2025 as other Bitcoin miners struggle
item.description: Riot Platforms posted record 2025 revenue of $647 million, driven by $576 million in Bitcoin mining revenue, while holding 18,005 BTC worth $1.6 billion.

item.title: Tether taps Deloitte for first USAT reserve report
item.description: The report is a third-party attestation, which provides a snapshot of reserves at a specific point in time, rather than a full audit of the company's finances.

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $67,000 as U.S. equities slide and oil pushes higher
item.description: Risk off sentiment builds ahead of Tuesday’s open, with investors moving into the dollar and watching energy markets amid ongoing Middle East tensions.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see $458M in inflows as Mideast conflict widens
item.description: US spot Bitcoin funds saw strong inflows and increasing volumes on Monday as institutional demand held up in spite of increasing Middle East tensions and broader market uncertainty.

item.title: OKX jumps into AI agent race with new OnchainOS toolkit
item.description: Developer layer aims to stitch together wallets, swaps and data feeds for autonomous bots.

item.title: Core Scientific sells $175 million in bitcoin as AI pivot accelerates
item.description: CORZ still holds under 1,000 BTC but look to "remain opportunistic" moving forward.

item.title: Very good move of #Bitcoin yesterday, holding above $65K and rallied towards the range resistance. I mentioned that I expected some days of consolidation before a breakout upwards is likely to occur. The fact is that we've been establishing this range for quit - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE15RUZzU0h0eGhzSkkwci1rbkljV24za1NFSWVneHBJVS00Nm5nZFZBYWZxOGljOFFoS2g1ZlpXQ1Jjc2pVWjV6bkM2bG92czRGZFdmME94VDliMkJaSW54NmFmTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Very good move of #Bitcoin yeste…

item.title: Bank of Japan testing blockchain settlement for bank deposits in new sandbox
item.description: BOJ Governor Kazuo Ueda said the experiments will examine links between blockchain systems and Japan’s existing settlement infrastructure.

item.title: Bitcoin supply approaching 20 million: The final million will take another 114 years to mine
item.description: Out of a fixed maximum supply of 21 million coins, more than 95% of all bitcoin that will ever exist is now in circulation.

item.title: BitMEX co-founder pledges $27M to London maths institute after Trump pardon
item.description: Ben Delo paid a $10 million fine after pleading guilty to US banking violations in 2022 and was granted a pardon by President Donald Trump in March 2025.

item.title: Iranian Crypto Outflows Spike After Airstrikes Amid a Year of Rising On-Chain Activity
item.description: TL;DR On-chain data shows a sharp increase in activity from major Iranian exchanges in the hours following the February 28,… The post Iranian Crypto Outflows Spike After Airstrikes Amid a Year of Rising On-Chain Activity appeared first on …

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Bitcoin positive sentiment hits its highest level since February 6th as BTC rallies 7% and nearly breaches $70K, per Santiment. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1WMjctczQ4aHBiQU9lTWZxUmR0SmJZWnA2M1BuSXdiLWZJUkpqWVlVUzBDb2tRN0IxYlhiTjJhUWVRbFVYYmNKbHdyUzR3Mld0bkxlMXZpRU40X2toN0xQaUR0Z0Y?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Bitcoin positive sentim…

item.title: Bitcoin is forming a bottom as the 4-year cycle ends: VanEck CEO
item.description: Jan van Eck suggested that analysts have been overcomplicating recent Bitcoin price action, arguing that the four-year cycle has been the main driver holding prices down.

item.title: Core Scientific shares move lower as Q4 earnings miss estimates
item.description: Core Scientific missed revenue expectations in the fourth quarter as Bitcoin miners were squeezed by lower prices and higher costs.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs as BTC ETFs post one of the quarter’s biggest inflow days amid Iran volatility
item.description: U.S. BTC ETFs added $458 million, suggesting institutional buyers are absorbing the weekend shock that briefly sent BTC to $63,000.

item.title: Circle Stock Extends Double-Digit Gains Amid Broader Crypto Rally
item.description: Circle’s post-earnings breakout gains continue to rise as USDC growth, policy shifts, and macro volatility converge.

item.title: NEAR token jumps 17% after ‘Confidential Intents’ launch, outpaces privacy tokens sector
item.description: Private execution layer aims to curb MEV and front-running as the token extends 40% weekly rally despite modest onchain earnings.

item.title: Court Ruling Raises Risk of Nevada Trading Halt for Kalshi, Polymarket
item.description: A federal judge has sent Nevada’s cases against Kalshi and Polymarket back to state court, allowing regulators to seek temporary injunctions.

item.title: ⚡️ TODAY: Vitalik Buterin details Ethereum's plan to decentralize block building and tackle MEV through ePBS, FOCIL, and encrypted mempools. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9FZVVpNWVQcXdYaDF6elUxTldrdmRLWjdOdjlLa3pPMExWencxTk5Kd2hmRVM3RFcxVnl3b192TWxPakN5M2labXpyaDk2R2s2RklFZnlNZmQyVTJSQjI3VVA0UFg?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ TODAY: Vitalik Buterin detai…

item.title: 🔥BULLISH: Tennessee's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act is recommended for passage and referred to the Finance, Ways, and Means Committee. If passed, the bill allows the state treasurer to allocate up to 10% of public funds into Bitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB3ODVQRXZqbkJFRDJDbXBncnktbFNkV25SM24yRUhBNnplYUo1Z182ZUZSbDdhZWhQSkNZZ0FiT29abTRBWkdUcGVhV2NJVXNzd212ZXFwalM2djViWDR5Z2NFanI?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥BULLISH: Tennessee's Strategi…

item.title: Human Brain Cells Learn to Play Doom in Cortical Labs Experiment
item.description: Living human neurons were trained to play Doom, extending the long-running engineering benchmark into biological computing.

item.title: Senate Advances Housing Bill With CBDC Ban, Draws White House Backing
item.description: The vote marks one of the strongest bipartisan showings of this Congress, suggesting the package could clear further procedural hurdles.

item.title: U.S. Senate housing bill includes CBDC ban
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee's bipartisan "ROAD to Housing Act" includes a provision banning the Fed from issuing a CBDC before 2031.
